info.name: SmartEduConnect API - Complete Collection for Flutter
info.description: Complete API collection with ALL 180+ endpoints for SmartEduConnect Flutter mobile app development. Includes admin panel, teacher portal, parent portal, and all management features.

request.description: Check if admin user exists in the system
Login with email and password. Returns user data and API token.
Register new user (admin only during setup)
Get attendance summary for a specific student
Get attendance report for a class on a specific date
Get exam marks for a specific student
Get all notifications for current user
Get VAPID public key for push notifications
Get messages with a specific user
Send a message to another user
Get fees data for parent's children
Get images in a specific folder
